code:
import io
import string

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> Option<String>
  let parts = string.split(line, "=")
  if parts.len() < 2
    None
  else
    let key_opt = parts.get(0)
    match key_opt
    when Some(key)
      if string.is_empty(key)
        None
      else
        mut value = ""
        mut i = 1
        while i < parts.len()
          let part_opt = parts.get(i)
          match part_opt
          when Some(p)
            if i == 1
              value = p
            else
              value = "#{value}=#{p}"
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          i = i + 1
        end
        Some("#{key}:#{value}")
      end
    when None
      None
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      match parse_line(line)
      when Some(output)
        print(output)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
